sql_array: CREATE TABLE vad_resources (id INT PRIMARY KEY, sticker_uri VARCHAR(255), base_uri_of_resources VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO vad_resources (id, sticker_uri, base_uri_of_resources) VALUES (1, 'http://example.com/resource1.vad', 'http://example.com/base/');
UPDATE vad_resources SET sticker_uri = 'http://example.com/resource2.vad' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT VAD_PACK(sticker_uri, base_uri_of_resources) FROM vad_resources WHERE id = 1;
